name: Sandtortchen (Sand Tarts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and butter together.
2. Beat in the eggs, one at a time.
3. Gradually blend in the flour until a smooth dough forms.
4. Chill the dough overnight.
5. Roll out the dough as thinly as possible on a well-floured board.
6. Work with 1/4 of the dough at a time, keeping the rest chilled.
7. Cut into diamonds using a knife.
8. Place the cookies on greased cookie sheets.
9. Brush each cookie with beaten egg white.
10. Sprinkle with sugar and a pinch of cinnamon.
11. Place a pecan half in the center of each cookie.
12. Bake in a preheated 350°F (175°C) oven for 8 to 10 minutes, or until the edges are light brown.
13. Cool on the cookie sheets for 1 minute before transferring to wire racks.
14. Store in an airtight container.
